rejected_intermediate_problems: A first rewrite removed project and model-name splits but introduced 'origi- / nal', 'con- / verted', 'com- / parison', 'cer- / tify', 'ap- / pear', and 'lim- / itation'.
A second rewrite removed most of that cluster but still split 'Conver- / tAsset', 'Miss- / ing', and 'ev- / idence'.
The accepted version protects the ConvertAsset name, avoids the long Asset Converter phrase in the line-critical paragraph, and shortens the final scope sentence.

change_summary.summary: Rewrote Gate 3 as a selected-bin eligibility check and Gate 4 as a stack-entry scope claim, preserving the same evidence boundary while removing the page-4 linebreak cluster.

observations: The final page-4 Method crop removes the targeted Gate 3/Gate 4 split cluster around ConvertAsset, Converter, renderability, fidelity, DualVLN, repeats, and evidence.
Gate 3 remains a selected-bin material-baseline eligibility check, not a full material-semantics claim.
Gate 4 remains a stack-entry sanity claim, not a broad navigation benchmark.
The final contact sheet remains 11 pages with no obvious float, table, or blank-page regression.
